glosses.ja: キスする; 口づけする

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg); expresses intention and selects a bare infinitive complement ('küssen').
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular accusative; direct object of 'küssen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'will'.

translations.es: Mis padres se dan un beso rápido.
translations.it: I miei genitori si danno un bacio veloce.
translations.pt: Meus pais deram um beijo rápido.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi hôn nhau một cái rồi thôi.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders gaven elkaar een snelle kus.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता ने जल्दी से एक चुंबन किया।
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου έδωσαν ένα γρήγορο φιλί.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine ga hverandre et raskt kyss.
translations.id: Orang tua saya saling berciuman sebentar.
translations.ja: 両親は軽くキスをした。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with the plural noun 'Eltern' (nominative plural).
Common noun (plural tantum); subject of the sentence.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person plural); main predicate of the clause.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person); here used with reciprocal meaning ('each other'); object of 'küssen'.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates short duration of the action.

sentences.target: Im Krankenhaus darf er sie nicht küssen.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈkʁaŋkənhaʊ̯s daʁf eːɐ̯ ziː nɪçt ˈkʏsn̩/

translations.de: Im Krankenhaus darf er sie nicht küssen.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈkʁaŋkənhaʊ̯s daʁf eːɐ̯ ziː nɪçt ˈkʏsn̩/
translations.en: He isn't allowed to kiss her at the hospital.
translations.es: En el hospital no le permiten besarla.
translations.fr: À l'hôpital, il n'a pas le droit de l'embrasser.
translations.it: In ospedale non gli è permesso baciarla.
translations.ru: В больнице ему нельзя ее целовать.
translations.pt: No hospital, ele não pode beijá-la.
translations.he: בבית החולים אסור לו לנשק אותה.
translations.vi: Ở bệnh viện, anh ấy không được phép hôn cô ấy.
translations.ar: في المستشفى لا يُسمح לו بتقبيلها.
translations.nl: In het ziekenhuis mag hij haar niet kussen.
translations.uk: У лікарні йому не дозволяють цілувати її.
translations.hu: A kórházban nem szabad megcsókolnia őt.
translations.hi: अस्पताल में वह उसे चूम नहीं सकता।
translations.pl: W szpitalu nie wolno mu jej całować.
translations.el: Στο νοσοκομείο δεν του επιτρέπεται να τη φιλήσει.
translations.nb: På sykehuset får han ikke kysse henne.
translations.id: Di rumah sakit, ia tidak boleh menciumnya.
translations.sv: På sjukhuset får han inte kyssa henne.
translations.ro: La spital nu are voie să o sărute.
translations.da: På hospitalet må han ikke kysse hende.
translations.fi: Sairaalassa hän ei saa suudella häntä.
translations.ja: 病院では彼は彼女にキスしてはいけない。

tokens.explanation: Fused form of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem' (dative); introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative), marking location.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg); expresses permission/possibility and selects a bare infinitive complement ('küssen').
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Personal pronoun in accusative; direct object of 'küssen'. Ambiguous between feminine singular ('her') and plural ('them') by form; context suggests a person.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate, denying the action ('nicht küssen').
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal auxiliary 'darf'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder küssen Oma zum Abschied.

translations.de: Die Kinder küssen Oma zum Abschied.
translations.es: Los niños besan a la abuela para despedirse.
translations.fr: Les enfants embrassent leur grand-mère pour lui dire au revoir.
translations.it: I bambini baciano la nonna per salutarla.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们亲了奶奶一下道别。
translations.yue: 啲細路為咗道別錫咗阿嫲一下。
translations.pt: As crianças beijam a avó para se despedir.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ hôn bà để chào tạm biệt.
translations.nl: De kinderen geven oma een kus om afscheid te nemen.
translations.hu: A gyerekek búcsúzóul megpuszilják a nagymamát.
translations.hi: बच्चे दादी को अलविदा कहने के लिए चूमते हैं।
translations.el: Τα παιδιά φιλούν τη γιαγιά για να την αποχαιρετήσουν.
translations.id: Anak-anak mencium nenek untuk mengucapkan selamat tinggal.
translations.sv: Barnen pussar sin mormor hej då.
translations.ro: Copiii o sărută pe bunica la despărțire.
translations.ja: 子どもたちはおばあちゃんに別れのキスをする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (nominative plural) modifying 'Kinder'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person plural); main predicate of the clause.
Common noun; direct object (accusative), the person being kissed.
Fused form of the preposition 'zu' + definite article 'dem' (dative); introduces a PP expressing occasion/purpose.
Common noun; object of 'zum' (dative) forming the adverbial PP 'zum Abschied' ('as/for a farewell').
